name: King Arthur Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. About 2 hours before needed, dissolve 1 tablespoon each of sugar, active dry yeast, and salt in warm water using a large spoon.
2. Gradually blend in 5 1/2 to 6 1/2 cups of all-purpose flour until combined.
3. Add 2 tablespoons of olive oil for flavor.
4. Turn the mixture out onto a floured surface and knead until smooth and springy.
5. Clean and grease a large bowl, place the dough in it, cover, and let rise until doubled in bulk (1 to 2 hours).
6. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C).
7. Punch down the dough, divide into 3 to 4 pieces.
8. Roll out each piece on a floured surface into circles that fit into 12-inch pizza pans using a floured rolling pin.
9. Work from the center to the outside like pie dough. Let the dough rest several times to relax it and make it more cooperative, turning it over occasionally.
10. Brush with olive oil, spread pizza or spaghetti sauce lightly over the surface, and add desired toppings.
11. Sprinkle grated cheese on top.
12. Bake for 15 minutes.
